**What problem does this solve?**

**Proposed shape**
New channel? New skill (MCP server)? Config surface change? Mobile app
change?

**Is this substrate behavior instead?**
If it's about the agent loop, capabilities, memory, or providers, it likely
belongs in [bastion-core](https://github.com/thewaifucorp/bastion-core)
instead.

**Alternatives considered**
